evals.name: 지원동기-prnd
evals.prompt: 헤이딜러(PRND) AI Engineer 포지션 지원동기를 작성해 주세요. 1000자 이내.
evals.expected_output: A 1000-char Korean 자소서 answer with natural STAR structure, connecting Danil's AI agent platform experience to PRND's mission. Should mention specific metrics from CV and reference PRND's product/tech.

evals.name: 직무경험-concise
evals.prompt: 직무와 관련된 본인의 경험 및 역량을 구체적으로 서술해 주세요. (500자 이내)
evals.expected_output: A tight 500-char Korean answer focusing on the most relevant technical experience with concrete metrics. Should feel complete despite the constraint.

evals.name: 협업갈등
evals.prompt: 팀 프로젝트에서 의견 차이나 갈등 상황을 해결한 경험을 서술해 주세요. (800자 이내)
evals.expected_output: An 800-char Korean answer about a team collaboration challenge, with clear individual contribution and resolution. Should feel authentic, not templated.
